hero.title: Audit with clarity, confidence, and calm
hero.subtitle: A premium workspace for IFRS reporting, working papers, and financial intelligence — designed for professionals who demand precision without complexity.

overview.title: Everything audit teams need — in one calm workspace
overview.description: From trial balance to sign-off, the platform brings structure, traceability, and intelligent assistance to every engagement.

aiAudit.title: AI Audit
aiAudit.description: Intelligent workflows that accelerate review while keeping human judgment at the center.

workingPapers.title: Working Papers
workingPapers.description: Structured documentation with evidence links, review notes, and clear sign-off trails.

financialStatements.title: Financial Statements
financialStatements.description: IFRS-aligned reporting with version control and audit-ready exports.

trialBalance.title: Trial Balance
trialBalance.description: Import, map, and reconcile with confidence across entities and periods.

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Reduce repetitive tasks so your team focuses on judgment, not data entry.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Built-in controls for regulatory requirements and professional standards.

features.title: Designed for how professionals actually work
features.description: Minimal interface. Maximum clarity. Every detail earns its place.

items.title: Calm by default
items.description: Restrained visuals and generous spacing for eight-hour review sessions.

items.title: Instant orientation
items.description: Clear hierarchy so you always know where you are and what needs attention.

items.title: Keyboard-first
items.description: Power navigation and shortcuts for teams who move fast.

items.title: Multi-language
items.description: Native support for Azerbaijani, English, Russian, and Turkish.

items.title: Real-time collaboration
items.description: Shared context across organizations, workspaces, and engagements.

items.title: Audit-ready exports
items.description: Defensible outputs with full traceability for regulators and clients.

enterprise.title: Built for enterprise scale
enterprise.description: Multi-tenant architecture with the governance, permissions, and audit trail that regulated professions require.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: Manage firms and client structures with clear ownership boundaries.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: Isolated environments for teams, clients, or engagements.

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Legal entities with lifecycle, versioning, and complete identity management.

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant
multiTenant.description: Strict tenant isolation with workspace-scoped data access.

auditTrail.title: Audit trail
auditTrail.description: Every significant action recorded with context and accountability.

versioning.title: Versioning
versioning.description: Optimistic locking and version history for defensible change management.

security.title: Security you can defend
security.description: Zero-trust principles, encryption, and row-level security — designed for regulated environments from day one.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.description: Data protected in transit and at rest with industry-standard cryptography.

auditLogs.title: Audit logs
auditLogs.description: Immutable event records for compliance and forensic review.

zeroTrust.title: Zero trust
zeroTrust.description: Verify every request. Trust nothing by default.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Architecture aligned with professional and regulatory expectations.

ai.title: AI that respects professional judgment
ai.description: An intelligent assistant designed for auditors — not a replacement for expertise, but an accelerator for it.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.description: Context-aware help across engagements, workpapers, and financial data.

naturalLanguage.title: Natural language auditing
naturalLanguage.description: Ask questions in plain language and get structured, traceable answers.

ifrs.title: IFRS assistance
ifrs.description: Guidance aligned with international standards — always with human sign-off.

risk.title: Risk detection
risk.description: Surface anomalies and areas requiring professional skepticism.

analysis.title: Financial analysis
analysis.description: Intelligent insights across trial balance, statements, and disclosures.

reports.title: Report generation
reports.description: Draft professional outputs you review, refine, and approve.
